name: Ginger Stuffed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplants in half lengthways and scoop out the flesh into a bowl.
2. Cube the scooped-out eggplant flesh.
3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent.
4. Add cubed eggplant to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
5. Stir in tamari to taste.
6. In a large bowl, combine the cooked eggplant mixture, grated ginger, celery, peppers, peanut butter, curry powder, cayenne, and nutmeg.
7. Spoon the mixture into each eggplant half and place on a baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
